title: Early Life in Canada
description: Raised in Ontario with a strong church community; developed a heart for teaching and service.

title: First Mission Trip
description: A short-term trip to Central America sparked a calling to full-time overseas ministry.

title: Missionary Training
description: Completed cross-cultural training, language study, and ordination preparation with sending church support.

title: Arrival in Peru
description: Settled in Lima and began building relationships with local churches and community leaders.

title: Highland Expansion
description: Extended ministry to Andean villages — launching outreach circuits and women's fellowship groups.

title: Youth Program Launch
description: Established sports and discipleship programs reaching over 60 young people across three neighborhoods.

title: Flood Relief Response
description: Coordinated emergency aid and pastoral care for families affected by severe seasonal flooding.

title: Transition & Ongoing Partnership
description: Returned to Canada while maintaining close partnership with Peruvian leaders who continue the work.
